creator: freebsd@shotmail.ru
text:
He was kicked due to the last comment he said.
22:52:41 < miwi> everything else you can play with urself and just be done with it..

And I honestly don't see any documentation stating I need to provide actual info on why I submitted a patch.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/security.html

Doesn't mention anything, this security issue isn't one that would really require all that vuxml stuff. So I didn't provide any.
